common.401: The request requires authentication to access the resource, and the client did not send any credentials, or the credentials that were sent are wrong.
common.404: The server has not found any entry to match the request that it was given.
common.500: The server encountered an unexplained problem which has prevented it from executing the given request
common.503: The server is currently unable to handle the request it was sent due to maintenance or an overload on its resources. This is a typical condition that may be relieved later on, so the client can try again.

errors.UserNotActive: Your account has not active , please contact our app support team for any further queries
errors.PasswordDoesNotMatch: New Password is not same as Confirm New Password.
errors.OldPasswordAndNewPasswordSame: Old password and new password cannot be same.
errors.UserAlreadyExists: user with this phone number already exists
errors.InvalidStartDate: Start date cannot be in the past.
errors.InvalidEndDate: End date cannot be in the past.
errors.EndDateBeforeStartDate: End date must be after start date.
errors.MaxParticipantsLessThanMinParticipants: Max participants cannot be less than min participants.
errors.PriceMustBeGreaterThanZero: Price must be greater than zero.
errors.UserNotVerified: User not verified. Please verify your email to join the campaign.
errors.CampaignFull: Campaign is full. Please try different campaign.
errors.UserNotParticipant: User is not a participant of this campaign.
